name: maze
author: cristian-milea
description: First-person maze crawler with random or daily-seeded mazes.
long_description: Generates a fresh maze on the device (recursive backtracker) and shows it in a Wizardry-style first-person view. Phone is a D-pad (Turn-left, Forward, Back, Turn-right); the e-ink draws the perspective walls plus a fog-of-war minimap that only reveals visited cells and what you can see straight down an open corridor. Two modes: random (new seed every time) and daily (everyone on every device gets the same maze each day). Find the exit in as few steps as the optimum.
